chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.2757 of 2024 11.12.2024 Mian Shahbaz Ali, advocate for the applicant a/w applicant. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Chohan, advocate. Mr. Saleem Akhtar, Addl.P.G. = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J:- After arguments, it has transpired that the applicant actually owes an amount of Rs.5,100,000/- to the complainant, of which he has already given him a cheques. However, applicant and his counsel both have undertaken that within a month the said amount will be paid to the complaint before the trial court without fail, which proposal has been accepted by the complainant and Addl.P.G. 2. In view of above this application is allowed, and interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. However, if the applicant does not pay the amount of Rs.5,100,000/- to the complainant before the trial court within a month, this application shall be deemed to have been dismissed and the trial court would be competent to take action against the applicant including his arrest immediately. 3. The observations made herein above are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. 4. This Cr. Bail Applications is disposed of. J U D G E Hafiz
